title: Senior Teacher - Sri Chaitanya - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Sri Chaitanya - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Senior Teacher in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
